name: fireflag-mcp
description: Fireflag Cartridge — Extension-to-MCP mapping and discovery tools
author: Jonathan D.A. Jewell <j.d.a.jewell@open.ac.uk>

tools.name: Map Extension
tools.description: Map an extension directory to available MCP tools

tools.name: List Mapped Extensions
tools.description: List all mapped extensions with their MCP capabilities

tools.name: Get Extension Tools
tools.description: Get available MCP tools for a specific extension

tools.name: Discover Extensions
tools.description: Discover extensions in a directory and map their capabilities
